summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Collaboration feature. All 10 requested features verified working: Kanban board with 4 columns, task cards with priority/status badges, overdue banner, filter dropdowns, view toggle (Kanban/Table), Add Task modal, Team Management page, Add Member modal, navigation badge for overdue tasks, and existing dashboard features. Backend APIs 100% functional. Frontend 100% functional.
passed_tests: Collaboration page loads with Kanban board showing 4 columns (To Do, In Progress, Done, Delayed)
Task cards display with priority badges (High/Medium/Low) - 7 badges found
Task cards display with status badges - 7 badges found
Task cards show assignee avatars with names
Task cards show due dates
Overdue banner appears when tasks are past due date - '1 task overdue and need attention'
Assignee filter dropdown works - filters tasks correctly
Status filter dropdown present and functional
Priority filter dropdown present and functional
View toggle switches between Kanban and Table views
Table view displays all 8 columns (checkbox, task, assignee, status, priority, due date, comments, actions)
Add Task button opens modal with all fields (description, assignee, due date, priority)
Priority selector in modal works with High/Medium/Low options
New task can be added successfully
Team Management page shows 3 team member cards with stats
Team member cards show avatar, name, role, email, completed/pending task counts
Add Member button opens modal
Navigation badge shows overdue task count (1)
Dashboard shows 4 stat cards including 'Overdue Tasks'
Dashboard shows 'Team Tasks' section with circular progress
Existing dashboard features still work (stats, templates, generate plan)
Backend API root endpoint working (200 OK)
Backend generate endpoint working with valid startup prompts
Backend guardrail correctly blocks non-startup requests
Backend rejects empty prompts (400)
Backend status POST endpoint working
Backend status GET endpoint working
critical_code_review_comments: State is managed in React useState - tasks and team members are not persisted to database (as noted in mocked_api info)
CSS styling is complete and well-organized with proper responsive breakpoints
All interactive elements have proper hover states and transitions
ThinklyLabs-style UI with teal (#14B8A6) accents implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Initial mock data for team members (3) and tasks (7) is defined in App.js constants INITIAL_TEAM_MEMBERS and INITIAL_TASKS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collaboration feature fully implemented and tested. State is managed in React useState (not persisted to database). Team members: John Doe (Founder), Sarah Kim (Co-founder), Mike Chen (Developer). Tasks include various statuses and priorities with some overdue. All CSS styles are in App.css lines 2813+. Components are in App.js lines 434-706 (Team/Task components) and 1042-1116 (Collaboration tab render).
mocked_api_note: Team and task data is managed in React state (useState), NOT persisted to database. This is by design as noted in the review request.
